use_cases: Display hierarchical file or folder structures in file explorers
Show nested category or taxonomy trees in e-commerce product browsers
Render organizational charts or team hierarchies
Build expandable navigation menus with nested items
Display structured data like outlines or nested lists
ai_summary: A hierarchical tree view component for displaying nested data structures with expand/collapse functionality. Supports chevron or plus-minus toggle icons and configurable indentation. Built on headless-tree core with Radix UI primitives for accessibility.
